name: Badge Panic
mechanic: A number ticks up in the corner like unread notifications. Tap to clear it, but only when the badge turns solid red. Tap a phantom shimmer and you lose a life. The compulsion to clear is the trap.

name: FYP Pull
mechanic: Pull down to load a new card. Each swipe either drops points, a dud, or a bomb. Stop after three duds or cash out. The lever becomes a slot machine you control with one thumb.

name: Typing Standoff
mechanic: A typing bubble pulses in the chat window. Tap the instant the dots vanish and a message appears. Tap early and you look desperate; tap late and the conversation dies. Each round the pause grows longer.

name: Streak Tightrope
mechanic: Your streak number climbs automatically toward midnight. Tap once to 'send' and bank it, but the clock randomly speeds up or stalls. Miss the window and the number burns to zero.

name: Story Expire
mechanic: A ring timer shrinks like a story circle. Tap when the remaining arc hits a hidden target zone before it disappears. Each level hides the target sooner and speeds the decay.

name: Seen Wait
mechanic: A message status cycles from 'sent' to 'delivered' to 'seen.' Tap exactly when 'seen' appears. The delay is random and lengthens; premature taps mark you as 'left on read.'

name: Live Count
mechanic: A viewer-count number flickers under your stream. Hold to keep going; release to cash out followers. Sudden viewer drops force a split-second decision: hold for the comeback or bail before zero.

name: Autoplay Stop
mechanic: Clips autoplay back-to-back. Tap exactly in the black gap between videos to 'pause' and score. The gap shrinks and fake transitions flash; stopping on a transition ends your streak.

name: Lip Sync Duel
mechanic: Lyrics scroll across a split screen. Tap when the active word crosses your marker to 'duet' perfectly. Decoy words flash early to bait a bad tap; each round scrolls faster.

name: Face Morph Lock
mechanic: A face mesh morphs through filters. Tap when it lands on the target look for a split second. Morphs speed up and add decoy matches that look almost right.

name: Doom Refresh
mechanic: Pull down to refresh. The spinner pauses at random. Release exactly when it lands on green. Release on red and you 'lose connection.' Each refresh adds a fake hang that tests your nerve.

name: Request Purgatory
mechanic: Message-request bubbles float up the screen. Swipe right to accept, left to decline. Accept spam and you lose a life; decline a real one and you lose two. The icons grow more identical as you climb.

name: Save Later Guilt
mechanic: Posts fly by. Swipe right to save, left to skip. Saved posts pile at the bottom; if the stack reaches the top, you drown. The real win is learning to stop saving.

name: Comment Cliff
mechanic: A comment thread unrolls line by line. Tap to expand the next line before it collapses. Each level hides lines faster and plants fake 'read more' traps that steal your time.

name: Poll Fever
mechanic: Two poll bars race toward 50%. Tap when your chosen bar crosses the line. The bars jitter, stall, and reverse; the result stays uncertain until the final frame.

name: Going Live
mechanic: A 'LIVE' badge pulses. Tap to start exactly when the ring completes. Start early and you get zero viewers; start late and you miss the trend window. The countdown is irregular.

name: Online Dot
mechanic: Green dots appear and fade across a grid of profiles. Tap only the dot that stays solid for a full second. Fake dots flicker to exploit the green-dot impulse.

name: Like Check
mechanic: Your post sits center-screen and the heart count flickers. Tap only when it actually rises; never tap on a hold or a fake surge. Each round adds more phantom jumps.

name: Link in Bio
mechanic: A bio link loads with a progress bar. Tap exactly when it hits 100% before the page 'redirects' to a fake ad. The bar stutters, backtracks, and pauses to punish rushing.

name: Unsent Draft
mechanic: A 'Post' button hovers. Hold it down while a second counter fills. Release early and the draft vanishes; release late and it auto-posts cringe. The fill pauses unpredictably.

name: Badge Sunset
mechanic: Red badges drift in from the edges. Don't tap them. They fade on their own if you wait. Each badge that dissolves by patience blooms into a soft particle and clears the corner.

name: FYP Breath
mechanic: Cards drift by slowly. You do not swipe. After each card the screen holds a breath-prompt circle until it fades. The reward is the space between, not the next card.

name: Streak Release
mechanic: A streak number gently counts down day by day. You do nothing. When it reaches zero it turns into a seed and plants a small garden mark. Letting go is the only action.

name: Seen Peace
mechanic: Messages send without status labels. The screen shows only a slow ripple; you wait until it fades. The loop teaches that 'delivered' does not need a reply.

name: Story Archive
mechanic: A story ring appears and completes without disappearing. Tap once to stamp it as a soft memory. The ring stays on screen and slowly forms a calm collage. Nothing expires.
